rulings.Case Title: MADELYN FISH et al VS. MARIA BURLUK et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-15-544392 WITH CASE CGC-14-539014
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, July 13, 2015 line 1. DEFENDANTS MARIA BURLUK and EKATERINA VENGLEVSKA's MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-15-544392 WITH CASE CGC-14-539014 Hearing Required to address lack of Proof of Service of the motion plaintiff in CGC-15-544392. = (501/GLW)

rulings.Case Title: SOFIA NEW ET AL VS. MANUEL LANGIT ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, July 13, 2015 line 2. CROSS DEFENDANTS JOSEPH NEW and SOFIA NEW's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Moving party failed to comply with CRC 31112(a) and (c) and CRC 3.1110. Additionally, in the points and authorities cross-defendants failed to indicate any specific deficiencies in any cause of action (except Statute of Limitations addressed below), the arguments being copied verbatim from the Points and Authorities in support of Demurrer to the First Amended Cross-Complaint. Moving party failed to show that all causes of action are barred by statute of limitations. See Second Amended Cross-Complaint 17-20, 22, 24. = (501/GLW)

rulings.Case Title: RICCI CORNELL VS. SUNG KWONG HUEY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, July 13, 2015 line 3. DEFENDANT AGNES HUEY's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT Overruled. Trespass cause of action sufficiently alleged and nuisance and negligence causes of action may be asserted in the alternative in the alterative. = (501/GLW)

rulings.Case Title: RICCI CORNELL VS. SUNG KWONG HUEY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Strike Portions Of Second Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, July 13, 2015 line 3. DEFENDANT AGNES HUEY's Motion To Strike Portions Of Second Amended Complaint GRANTED with leave to amend to allege facts to support request for punitive damages. = (501/GLW)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn For Entry Of Judgmnt Pursuant To Stip
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, July 13, 2015 line 4. PLAINTIFF URBAN PACIFIC PROPERTIES' Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation OFF CALENDAR. Moving party failed to provide a courtesy copy of the moving papers per SFRL 2.6B. = (501/GLW)
